<mxGraphModel dx="800" dy="600" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/>
<!-- Row 1: independent starters --> <mxCell id="je25" value="JE-25 / local emulator spike
(HARD GATE)" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#B71C1C;strokeColor=#7F0000;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="60" width="160" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="je26" value="JE-26 / pnpm root" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#1565C0;strokeColor=#0D47A1;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="60" width="150" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Row 2 --> <mxCell id="je28" value="JE-28 / modules label/
net/rds/cognito" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#2E7D32;strokeColor=#1B5E20;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="180" width="160" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="je27" value="JE-27 / users pkg" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#1565C0;strokeColor=#0D47A1;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="180" width="150" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="je32" value="JE-32 / e2e harness" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#616161;strokeColor=#212121;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="430" y="180" width="150" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Row 3 --> <mxCell id="je30" value="JE-30 / modules
compute/api-gw" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#2E7D32;strokeColor=#1B5E20;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="300" width="160" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="je29" value="JE-29 / schema +
primitives" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#1565C0;strokeColor=#0D47A1;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="300" width="150" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Row 4 --> <mxCell id="je34" value="JE-34 / vault
tags sync" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#616161;strokeColor=#212121;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="430" y="300" width="150" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="je31" value="JE-31 / auth + domain +

compose" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#1565C0;strokeColor=#0D47A1;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="660" width="150" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Row 7: apply + e2e specs --> <mxCell id="je36" value="JE-36 / env/local +
apply + migrate" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#E65100;strokeColor=#BF360C;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="780" width="160" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Row 8 --> <mxCell id="je37" value="JE-37 / e2e specs" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#616161;strokeColor=#212121;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="430" y="780" width="150" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
